config_template.notes: in-place: result written into input_tensor_a; shapes [{N},{C},{H},{W}] must broadcast-match

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation tensor, post-groupnorm resnet hidden states
placement_observations.source: SDXL UNet resnet block: hidden_states = ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(hidden_states, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); hidden_states = ttnn.add_(hidden_states, temb, use_legacy=None)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: residual branch tensor, same shape as hidden_states

memory_config.shard_spec_template: input_tensor = ttnn.to_memory_config(input_tensor, hidden_states.memory_config()) when configs differ

placement_observations.source: SDXL UNet resnet skip-connection: memory configs of the two operands are force-matched before ttnn.add_(hidden_states, input_tensor, use_legacy=None)
SDXL UNet: after in-place residual add, hidden_states = ttnn.to_memory_config(hidden_states, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) unless module_path is the last up_blocks resnet

placement_observations.size_descriptor: resnet50 bottleneck output and downsample branch, equal shapes

memory_config.shard_spec_template: ds_out = ttnn.to_memory_config(ds_out, out.memory_config()); asserted ttnn.get_memory_config(out) == ttnn.get_memory_config(ds_out)

placement_observations.source: resnet50: operands must share identical (sharded) memory config before in-place fused add+relu

placement_observations.size_descriptor: static weight tensor resident on device
placement_observations.source: LoRA fusion: ttnn.add_(self._base_weights_device[base_key], delta) — delta added into persistent device-resident base weights
